channel.title: Skiing on CJ's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Skiing on CJ's Blog

item.title: Reflections on an AAI Hut Trip
item.description: At the end of January 2026 I took a 3-day AAI Avalanche Level 1 course through Colorado Mountain School. The course is offered in a hybrid capacity but I opted for one the hut-versions which take place at several 10th Mountain Division huts. Living in Denver, I knew the front range would be my closest and primary ski range, so the Broome Hut made the most sense.
